description: App version is a component that updates it's fields with the live information of Resonite's version.

fields.VersionNumber: The version number of Resonite. usually formatted year.month.day.minute. The minute part of the version is the minute from midnight UTC the version was compiled.
fields.VersionName: The name of the version of Resonite. Usually this is "Beta", "Alpha" or "Release" followed by ``VersionNumber``
fields.BuildTimeOfDay: The amount of minutes since midnight UTC.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: The fields are "Pseudo Driven" or constantly being written to. Attempting to change a field makes it instantly change back and not send an update event.
